title: Simple Sugarcane Farming
description: Allows sugarcane to grow without water
body:
## Simple Sugarcane Farming v1․0 😊 **Want to place your Sugarcane anywhere without the cruel shackles of _liquid?_**
(well wouldn't you believe it I have wonderful news for you) --- ### Features 1. Allows sugarcane to be placed on blocks that are not adjacent to water source blocks 2. Sugarcane will always grow exactly as though it were next to water That's all! enjoy your optimized sugarcane farming complex o7
or use it to make prettier builds and whatnot, that's also cool and neat ---
Technical "Methodology" 🤓 Modifies the "supports_sugar_cane_adjacently.json" block tag - This tag usually only contains "frosted_ice" to prevent frost walker boots from breaking sugarcane - I added every single block in the videogame to that tag Custom tag "all_the_blocks.json" is defined under the "hydrated_sugarcane" namespace - This tag was sourced from "Taglib" by HeDeAnTheonlyone (On Github!) - (I only tacked on the blocks added in 1.21.9+) - ((thank you so much, I really did not want to have to do that lol 🙏)) Also adds simple logic / scoreholder to provide an installation confirmation on first load only. No evil ticking functions or anything 👍
_Thx for checking out my datapack!! -DRE_ ------------------------------ ### Contact feel free to reach out with any issues/inquiries at: drecubed.contact@gmail.com -----------------------------
